daily_stats_select_scoped.name: daily_stats_select_scoped
daily_stats_select_scoped.using:
(client_id IN ( SELECT clients.id
   FROM clients
  WHERE private.can_access_client(clients.id)))

campaign_daily_stats_select_scoped.name: campaign_daily_stats_select_scoped
campaign_daily_stats_select_scoped.using:
(campaign_id IN ( SELECT c.id
   FROM campaigns c
  WHERE (private.can_access_client(c.client_id) AND ((private.current_app_role() <> 'client'::text) OR (c.type = 'outreach'::campaign_type)))))

client_users_select_scoped.name: client_users_select_scoped
client_users_select_scoped.using:
(private.is_admin_user() OR (user_id = auth.uid()) OR ((private.current_app_role() = 'manager'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM clients c
  WHERE ((c.id = client_users.client_id) AND (c.manager_id = auth.uid()))))))

public.admin_dashboard_daily.name: admin_dashboard_daily
public.admin_dashboard_daily.definition: SELECT cds.report_date, c.client_id, sum(cds.sent_count)::integer AS sent_count, sum(cds.reply_count)::integer AS reply_count, sum(cds.bounce_count)::integer AS bounce_count, sum(cds.unique_open_count)::integer AS unique_open_count, sum(cds.positive_replies_count)::integer AS positive_replies_count, sum(cds.inboxes_active)::integer AS inboxes_active FROM campaign_daily_stats cds JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = cds.campaign_id WHERE cds.report_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - '21 days'::interval) GROUP BY cds.report_date, c.client_id
